case_number: Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution

chunks.text: 1 ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Acquittal Appeal No.575 of 2022 Date Orders with Signatures of Judges 1. For orders on MA No.11908/2022 2. For hearing of main case 30.05.2025. None present for appellant. Mr. Noor Muhammad Dayo, Assistant Attorney General. This acquittal appeal, presented in office on 07.10.2022, was lastly fixed and taken up in Court on 23.08.2023. Thereafter, neither the appellant nor her counsel made any effort to get the same fixed in Court for hearing and decision. Even today neither the appellant nor her counsel is in attendance. It seems that they have lost interest and not pursuing the Appeal. This Criminal Acquittal Appeal is dismissed for non-prosecution. Judge
